# maxInputLength

**Instance Property**

The maximum length of input APDU (Application Protocol Data Unit) that the Smart Card reader slot is able to transfer to the Smart Card.

## Declaration

```swift
var maxInputLength: Int { get }
```

## Getting the Slot Configuration

- **name**: The name of the Smart Card reader slot.
- **maxOutputLength**: The maximum length of output APDU (Application Protocol Data Unit) that the Smart Card reader slot is able to transfer from the Smart Card.

items.description: The name of the Smart Card reader slot.
items.name: name

items.description: The maximum length of output APDU (Application Protocol Data Unit) that the Smart Card reader slot is able to transfer from the Smart Card.
